message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts
Failing test: "cursed sword adds 50% surcharge on the item base premium" — expects 165
Current error: Expected 165, received 115 (cursed flag is ignored)
Passing tests so far: 9

Spec rules for premium computation:
- Per-item modifiers (cursed +50%, high enchantment +30%) apply to the BASE PREMIUM of the affected item
- Policy-wide modifiers (loyalty -20%, first insurance +10%, follow-up -15%) apply to the POLICY BASE (sum of all item base premiums)
- All percentages are computed off the relevant unmodified base — they are added together (additive), NOT compounded
- Processing fee +5 G added last
- All amounts rounded UP in MHPCO's favor (final premium only — keep intermediate fractions)

The example proves this is additive:
"100 G base + 50 G curse + 30 G high enchantment − 20 G loyalty + 10 G first insurance − 15 G follow-up contract = 155 G + 5 G fee = 160 G"

For the failing test: sword (100), cursed=true, enchantment=3, newcomer (yearsWithMHPCO=0), this is first contract.
- 100 base
- + 50 cursed (50% of 100 = 50)
- + 10 first insurance (10% of policy base 100)
- + 5 fee
- = 165

Add minimal cursed support. Don't add high-enchantment or loyalty/follow-up yet (separate tests).

Current impl applies first insurance unconditionally. That's OK for now since the only customer scenario so far is yearsWithMHPCO=0 first contract (no prior step). Keep first insurance always-on for now.

Working dir: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-16_22-57-53_claim-office-example-mapping_v7-hybrid-green-refactor_opus-4-7-no-thinking

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, return after completion.

content.text: I'll analyze the current state and make the minimal change to pass the failing test.
Now I'll make the minimal change to support cursed items. I need to add cursed surcharge calculation per item.

content.text:
All 10 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Added `CURSED_SURCHARGE_RATE = 0.5` constant and `computeItemSurcharges` helper that sums 50% of base premium for each cursed main item. Added the surcharge to the premium calculation.
**Result**: All tests now pass (10 passing, 22 todo)
**Approach**: Minimal addition — only handles cursed flag for main items (not components, no high-enchantment yet, no loyalty/follow-up yet). First insurance still applied unconditionally on the unmodified policy base, matching the spec's additive rule for the only customer scenario tested so far (yearsWithMHPCO=0, first contract).
